mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work w LEFT OUTER JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp d ON w.work_director = d.emp_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp worker ON w.work_worker = worker.emp_id WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y'
AND w.work_date >= TO_DATE(#{workSearchSdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND w.work_date < TO_DATE(#{workSearchEdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND w.work_status = #{searchType}
AND ( UPPER(w.work_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(w.work_plan) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(p.plan_item) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(d.emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(worker.emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) )
AND (
w.work_status = 30
w.work_status = 20
w.work_status = 10
w.work_status = 40
w.work_status = 0
)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, work_list.* FROM ( SELECT w.work_id workId, w.work_plan workPlan, p.plan_item workItem, i.item_name workItemName, i.item_unit workItemUnit, w.work_order_qty workOrderQty, NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) workPrevQty, w.work_date workDate, w.work_director workDirector, d.emp_name workDname, w.work_worker workWorker, worker.emp_name workWname, w.work_status workStatus, w.work_cdate workCdate, w.work_mdate workMdate FROM work w LEFT OUTER JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp d ON w.work_director = d.emp_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp worker ON w.work_worker = worker.emp_id WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y'
AND w.work_date >= TO_DATE(#{workDTO.workSearchSdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND w.work_date < TO_DATE(#{workDTO.workSearchEdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND w.work_status = #{workDTO.searchType}
AND ( UPPER(w.work_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{workDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(w.work_plan) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{workDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(p.plan_item) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{workDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{workDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(d.emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{workDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(worker.emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{workDTO.searchKeyword} || '%')) )
AND (
w.work_status = 30
w.work_status = 20
w.work_status = 10
w.work_status = 40
w.work_status = 0
)
ORDER BY CASE w.work_status WHEN 40 THEN 1 WHEN 20 THEN 2 WHEN 10 THEN 3 WHEN 30 THEN 4 WHEN 0 THEN 5 ELSE 6 END ASC, CASE WHEN w.work_status IN (40, 20, 10) THEN w.work_date END ASC, CASE WHEN w.work_status IN (30, 0) THEN w.work_date END DESC, w.work_id DESC ) work_list WHERE ROWNUM <= #{page.endRow} ) WHERE rn >= #{page.startRow}

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN TRUNC(w.work_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS totalCnt,
SUM( CASE WHEN w.work_status = 20 AND TRUNC(w.work_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS ingCnt,
SUM( CASE WHEN w.work_status = 10 AND TRUNC(w.work_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS waitCnt,
SUM( CASE WHEN w.work_status = 30 AND TRUNC(w.work_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE + (9/24)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS finCnt,
SUM( CASE WHEN w.work_status = 40 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS delayCnt,
SUM( CASE WHEN w.work_status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS etcCnt
FROM work w LEFT OUTER JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp d ON w.work_director = d.emp_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp worker ON w.work_worker = worker.emp_id
WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y'
AND ( UPPER(w.work_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(w.work_plan) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(p.plan_item) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(i.item_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(d.emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(worker.emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) )

SELECT w.work_id workId, w.work_plan workPlan,
p.plan_item workItem, i.item_name workItemName, i.item_unit workItemUnit,
w.work_order_qty workOrderQty, NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) workPrevQty, w.work_date workDate,
w.work_director workDirector, d.emp_name workDname,
w.work_worker workWorker, worker.emp_name workWname,
w.work_dmsg workDmsg, w.work_wmsg workWmsg,
w.work_status workStatus, w.work_cdate workCdate, w.work_mdate workMdate,
r.rout_id routId, r.rout_name routName, r.rout_content routContent
FROM work w LEFT OUTER JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp d ON w.work_director = d.emp_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp worker ON w.work_worker = worker.emp_id LEFT OUTER JOIN routing r ON r.rout_item = p.plan_item AND r.rout_usage = 'Y'
WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y' AND w.work_id = #{workId}

SELECT rd.rout_dtl_id routDtlId, rd.rout_dtl_step routDtlStep,
pr.proc_id procId, pr.proc_name procName, pr.proc_content procContent, pr.proc_wp_type procWpType
FROM work w LEFT OUTER JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id LEFT OUTER JOIN routing r ON r.rout_item = p.plan_item AND r.rout_usage = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN routing_detail rd ON rd.rout_dtl_rout = r.rout_id AND rd.rout_dtl_usage = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN process pr ON rd.rout_dtl_proc = pr.proc_id AND pr.proc_usage = 'Y'
WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y' AND w.work_id = #{workId}
ORDER BY rd.rout_dtl_step ASC, rd.rout_dtl_id ASC
SELECT wp.wp_id wpId, wp.wp_name wpName, wp.wp_type wpType FROM workplace wp WHERE wp.wp_usage = 'Y' AND wp.wp_type = #{procWpType} ORDER BY wp.wp_id ASC

SELECT eq.eq_id eqId, eq.eq_name eqName, wp.wp_id wpId, wp.wp_name wpName, wp.wp_type wpType FROM equipment eq INNER JOIN workplace wp ON eq.eq_wpid = wp.wp_id WHERE wp.wp_usage = 'Y' AND wp.wp_type = #{procWpType} ORDER BY wp.wp_id ASC, eq.eq_id ASC

SELECT p.plan_id planId, p.plan_status planStatus, p.plan_item planItem, i.item_name planItemName, i.item_unit planItemUnit, p.plan_fin_qty planFinQty, TO_CHAR(p.plan_sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') planSdateStr, TO_CHAR(p.plan_edate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') planEdateStr, NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN w.work_usage = 'Y' THEN w.work_order_qty ELSE 0 END ), 0) planWorkingQty FROM plan p LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT OUTER JOIN work w ON p.plan_id = w.work_plan WHERE p.plan_usage = 'Y' AND p.plan_status IN (10, 20) GROUP BY p.plan_id, p.plan_status, p.plan_item, i.item_name, i.item_unit, p.plan_fin_qty, p.plan_sdate, p.plan_edate HAVING p.plan_fin_qty > NVL(SUM( CASE WHEN w.work_usage = 'Y' THEN w.work_order_qty ELSE 0 END ), 0) ORDER BY CASE p.plan_status WHEN 20 THEN 1 WHEN 10 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, p.plan_id DESC

SELECT e.emp_id AS empId, e.emp_name AS empName FROM emp e
e.emp_inoffice = 0 and e.emp_deptno = 10
AND ( UPPER(e.emp_id) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) OR UPPER(e.emp_name) LIKE TRIM(UPPER('%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')) )
ORDER BY e.emp_id

SELECT b.bom_id AS bomId, b.bom_item AS pItemId, pitem.item_name AS pItemName,
bd.bom_dtl_item AS itemId, i.item_name AS itemName, i.item_type AS itemType, i.item_unit AS itemUnit, i.item_spec AS itemSpec, i.item_unit_price AS itemUnitPrice,
SUM(bd.bom_dtl_qty) AS bomQty, #{workOrderQty} AS workOrderQty, SUM(bd.bom_dtl_qty) * #{workOrderQty} AS reqQty,
s.stock_id AS stockId, NVL(s.stock_prev_qty, 0) AS stockPrevQty, NVL(s.stock_avail_qty, 0) AS stockAvailQty, NVL(s.stock_reserve_qty, 0) AS stockReserveQty
FROM plan p JOIN bom b ON b.bom_item = p.plan_item JOIN item pitem ON pitem.item_id = b.bom_item JOIN bom_detail bd ON bd.bom_dtl_bom = b.bom_id JOIN item i ON i.item_id = bd.bom_dtl_item LEFT OUTER JOIN stock s ON s.stock_item = bd.bom_dtl_item
WHERE p.plan_id = #{workPlan} AND b.bom_usage = 'Y' AND bd.bom_dtl_usage = 'Y'
GROUP BY b.bom_id, b.bom_item, pitem.item_name, bd.bom_dtl_item, i.item_name, i.item_type, i.item_unit, i.item_spec, i.item_unit_price, s.stock_id, s.stock_prev_qty, s.stock_avail_qty, s.stock_reserve_qty
ORDER BY bd.bom_dtl_item
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work ( work_id, work_plan, work_order_qty, work_prev_qty, work_date, work_director, work_worker, work_dmsg, work_status, work_cdate, work_usage ) VALUES ( 'WO' || work_seq.NEXTVAL, #{workPlan}, #{workOrderQty}, 0, #{workDate}, #{workDirector}, #{workWorker}, #{workDmsg}, 10, SYSDATE + (9/24), 'Y' )
mapper.select:
SELECT w.work_id workId, w.work_plan workPlan,
p.plan_item workItem, p.plan_sdate planSdate, p.plan_edate planEdate,
i.item_name workItemName, i.item_unit workItemUnit,
p.plan_fin_qty planFinQty,
NVL(( SELECT SUM(w2.work_order_qty) FROM work w2 WHERE w2.work_usage = 'Y' AND w2.work_plan = w.work_plan ), 0) planWorkingQty,
NVL(( SELECT SUM(w2.work_order_qty) FROM work w2 WHERE w2.work_usage = 'Y' AND w2.work_plan = w.work_plan AND w2.work_id != w.work_id ), 0) otherWorkingQty,
p.plan_fin_qty - NVL(( SELECT SUM(w2.work_order_qty) FROM work w2 WHERE w2.work_usage = 'Y' AND w2.work_plan = w.work_plan AND w2.work_id != w.work_id ), 0) editableMaxQty,
w.work_order_qty workOrderQty, NVL(w.work_prev_qty, 0) workPrevQty, w.work_date workDate,
w.work_director workDirector, d.emp_name workDname,
w.work_worker workWorker, worker.emp_name workWname,
w.work_dmsg workDmsg, w.work_status workStatus, w.work_cdate workCdate, w.work_mdate workMdate
FROM work w LEFT OUTER JOIN plan p ON w.work_plan = p.plan_id LEFT OUTER JOIN item i ON p.plan_item = i.item_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp d ON w.work_director = d.emp_id LEFT OUTER JOIN emp worker ON w.work_worker = worker.emp_id
WHERE w.work_usage = 'Y' AND w.work_id = #{workId}

SELECT b.bom_id AS bomId, b.bom_item AS pItemId, pitem.item_name AS pItemName,
bd.bom_dtl_item AS itemId, i.item_name AS itemName,
SUM(bd.bom_dtl_qty) AS bomQty, w.work_order_qty AS workOrderQty, #{workPrevQty} AS workPrevQty,
SUM(bd.bom_dtl_qty) * w.work_order_qty AS reqQty, SUM(bd.bom_dtl_qty) * #{workPrevQty} AS usedQty, GREATEST( SUM(bd.bom_dtl_qty) * w.work_order_qty - SUM(bd.bom_dtl_qty) * #{workPrevQty}, 0 ) AS returnQty,
s.stock_id AS stockId, NVL(s.stock_prev_qty, 0) AS stockPrevQty, NVL(s.stock_avail_qty, 0) AS stockAvailQty, NVL(s.stock_reserve_qty, 0) AS stockReserveQty
FROM work w JOIN plan p ON p.plan_id = w.work_plan JOIN bom b ON b.bom_item = p.plan_item JOIN item pitem ON pitem.item_id = b.bom_item JOIN bom_detail bd ON bd.bom_dtl_bom = b.bom_id JOIN item i ON i.item_id = bd.bom_dtl_item LEFT OUTER JOIN stock s ON s.stock_item = bd.bom_dtl_item
WHERE w.work_id = #{workId} AND w.work_usage = 'Y' AND b.bom_usage = 'Y' AND bd.bom_dtl_usage = 'Y'
GROUP BY b.bom_id, b.bom_item, pitem.item_name, bd.bom_dtl_item, i.item_name, w.work_order_qty, s.stock_id, s.stock_prev_qty, s.stock_avail_qty, s.stock_reserve_qty
ORDER BY bd.bom_dtl_item
mapper.update: UPDATE work SET work_worker = #{workWorker}, work_dmsg = #{workDmsg}, work_date = #{workDate}, work_mdate = SYSDATE + (9/24) WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND work_usage = 'Y' AND work_status = 10
UPDATE work SET work_usage = 'N', work_mdate = SYSDATE + (9/24) WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND work_usage = 'Y' AND work_status = 10

UPDATE work SET work_prev_qty = #{workPrevQty},
work_status = #{workStatus},
work_wmsg = #{workWmsg}, work_mdate = SYSDATE + (9/24) WHERE work_id = #{workId} AND work_usage = 'Y' AND work_status IN (10, 20)
mapper.select:
SELECT wh_sec_id FROM ( SELECT sec.wh_sec_id FROM item i JOIN warehouse wh ON wh.wh_type = i.item_whtype JOIN wh_sec sec ON sec.wh_sec_whid = wh.wh_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT lot_bwhsec, COUNT(*) AS lot_cnt FROM lot WHERE lot_fqty > 0 GROUP BY lot_bwhsec ) lsec ON lsec.lot_bwhsec = sec.wh_sec_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sec2.wh_sec_whid, COUNT(*) AS lot_cnt FROM lot l JOIN wh_sec sec2 ON sec2.wh_sec_id = l.lot_bwhsec WHERE l.lot_fqty > 0 GROUP BY sec2.wh_sec_whid ) lwh ON lwh.wh_sec_whid = wh.wh_id
WHERE i.item_id = #{workItem} AND wh.wh_usage = 'Y' AND sec.wh_sec_usage = 'Y' AND NVL(lsec.lot_cnt, 0) + 1 <= sec.wh_sec_qty AND NVL(lwh.lot_cnt, 0) + 1 <= wh.wh_qty
ORDER BY wh.wh_id ASC, sec.wh_sec_order ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lot ( lot_id, lot_item, lot_work, lot_qty, lot_fqty, lot_etw, lot_exp, lot_qc, lot_status, lot_bwhsec ) SELECT 'LOT' || lot_seq.NEXTVAL, #{workItem}, #{workId}, #{workPrevQty}, #{workPrevQty}, SYSDATE + (9/24), SYSDATE + (9/24) + NVL(i.item_usedate, 0), 'N', 40, #{lotBwhsec} FROM item i WHERE i.item_id = #{workItem}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(lot_fqty), 0) FROM lot WHERE lot_item = #{itemId} AND lot_fqty > 0 AND lot_qc = 'Y' AND lot_status IN (10, 20)

SELECT lot_id AS lotId, lot_item AS lotItem, lot_fqty AS lotFqty FROM lot WHERE lot_item = #{itemId} AND lot_fqty > 0 AND lot_qc = 'Y' AND lot_status IN (10, 20) ORDER BY lot_exp ASC, lot_etw ASC, lot_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lot_use ( use_id, use_work, use_lot, use_qty, use_date, use_type ) VALUES ( 'USE' || use_seq.NEXTVAL, #{workId}, #{lotId}, #{useQty}, SYSDATE + (9/24), #{useType} )
mapper.update: UPDATE lot SET lot_fqty = lot_fqty - #{useQty}, lot_status = CASE WHEN lot_fqty - #{useQty} = 0 THEN 30 ELSE 20 END WHERE lot_id = #{lotId} AND lot_fqty >= #{useQty} AND lot_status IN (10, 20)
